title: Public atlas preview fixture refresh from staged spine export
problem: Staged spine atlas coherence now passes with clusters and follow-ups (ticket-317/319), but apps/public-site atlas-preview still consumes older golden fixture JSON. Operator product proof should refresh the static preview from a staged orchestrator export without widening public export policy.
acceptance_criteria: Atlas preview page renders refreshed staged-spine snapshot fixture with clusters[] and follow_up_questions[] populated.
Snapshot passes validate_atlas_snapshot and private-field scan before commit.
Public-site build passes; no public write routes added.
Pre-ticket audit required (public site + export boundary).
rollback_plan: Revert fixture JSON and site data copy only.
